name: ccc-operations
description: CCC internal operations toolkit. Four skills: CCC SOP Creator (HEROIC-format SOPs for any repeatable business process), Skill Creator Pro (full engineering loop for Claude skills and plugins), Marketplace Health Check (compliance scan across all marketplace plugins and skills), and Marketplace Publisher (syncs vault plugins to GitHub, validates token, ensures marketplace.json is complete, and pushes — the single command that keeps the marketplace up to date).
